# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: users
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: users
    version: v1
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: users
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: users
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: users
          image: ghcr.io/example/users:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: PORT
              value: "8080"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: users
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: users
spec:
  selector:
    app: users
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: orders
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: orders
    version: v1
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: orders
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: orders
          image: ghcr.io/example/orders:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: PORT
              value: "8080"
            - name: USERS_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://users"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: orders
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: orders
spec:
  selector:
    app: orders
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payments
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: payments
    version: v1
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payments
        version: v1
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: payments
          image: ghcr.io/example/payments:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: PORT
              value: "8080"
            - name: ORDERS_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://orders"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payments
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: payments
spec:
  selector:
    app: payments
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
